description.default: Track token consumption for SiYuan AI and third-party plugins, with per-API-key quota limits, custom alert thresholds, auto-cutoff, and cloud sync support. (Stats are for reference only; please refer to your API provider's official billing.)
description.zh_CN: 统计思源智能体及第三方插件的 Token 消耗，支持每个 API Key 单独设置限额与自定义提醒阈值，限额自动切断，S3/WebDAV 云同步数据合并。（统计数据仅供参考，请以 API 供应商官方账单为准）
